BULLETS TIP 1:
IF A BULLET SOUNDS EXACTLY LIKE A
BENEFIT STATEMENT, IT’S WRONG. A
BULLET SHOULD SHOULD HYPER
SPECIFIC AND PREFERABLY INTRIGUING
(LOOK AT EXAMPLES IN COPYPRO)
